mapper.select:
SELECT pq.id, pq.user_id, pq.title, pq.content, pq.created_at, pq.status, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages, COUNT(pa.id) AS answerCount FROM party_questions pq LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pq.user_id) LEFT JOIN party_answers pa ON (pa.question_id = pq.id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND pq.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.title},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY pq.created_at DESC

SELECT pq.id, pq.user_id, pq.title, pq.content, pq.created_at, pq.status, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages, ui.user_id AS sysUserId, COUNT(pa.id) AS answerCount FROM party_questions pq LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pq.user_id) LEFT JOIN party_answers pa ON (pa.question_id = pq.id) WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY pq.id ORDER BY pq.created_at DESC
